Control_Description: Implement firewalls and DDoS protection mechanisms at the network level to protect cloud-hosted services from network-based attacks
Apply secure baseline configurations to operating systems networks servers and user accounts to reduce the attack surface
Manage permissions and identity centrally using RBAC IBAC and ABAC mechanisms and implement tokenization for sensitive cloud resources
Audit all user activities and data movements using SIEM systems integrated with comprehensive log aggregation sources
Enable two-factor or multi-factor authentication for all users accessing cloud services in accordance with CDC requirements
Enable conditional access based on geographic location (Geo-Blocking) to restrict access from unauthorized regions
Conduct technical security assessments including penetration testing and risk analysis for all cloud environments
Classify all data according to sensitivity levels per applicable Omani laws regulations and CDC classification guidelines

Control_Title: Data Encryption in Transit and at Rest
Control_Description: Protect all data using encryption mechanisms during transfer processing and storage in cloud environments
Apply encryption using single double or customer-managed keys (BYOK) based on data sensitivity and CDC requirements
Implement the principle of least privilege for all access to data and cloud resources
Enable data loss prevention capabilities across all cloud applications to prevent unauthorized data exfiltration
Configure and maintain antivirus and antimalware protection for all servers and user devices in cloud environments
Implement systematic patch management to maintain current security patches for operating systems and applications
Implement automated backup and recovery capabilities for all critical cloud-hosted data and services
Establish and maintain a documented cyber incident response plan for cloud environments with defined roles and procedures
Establish data classification as a foundational prerequisite before deploying services to the cloud
Maintain overall compliance with Oman Cyber Defense Centre cloud security policies and requirements
